title: Beijing's surprise intervention on Meta's Manus rattles tech founders, VCs eyeing 'China shedding'
summary_full: Beijing's review has fueled concerns and confusion among Chinese tech founders and investors that had quietly embraced the so-called "Singapore-washing" model.
summary_public: Beijing's review has fueled concerns and confusion among Chinese tech founders and investors that had quietly embraced the so-called "Singapore-washing" model.
